_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ti shamwari, upinde.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yakavakwa kuti ivhurike kumitauro yose. Mutauro wose une mubayiro wekushandura.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Rondedzero yemitauro uye mibayiro ya Marks inogona kushanduka. Marks matokeni ekutora chikamu, kwete hisa.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Shandura Liana Banyan ku{{language}}. Wana Marks {{marks}}.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Shoko rega rega pane chirongwa ichi rakapihwa zita nemhaka. Mavambo emazita 26 akakosha.
speakFriend.step1Body: Vhura Mubayiro weShanduro kubva Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Shandura mitsetse yose inodikanwa. Tumira neBounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Mushure mekugamuchirwa, unowana Marks uye unorekodwa pa IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ti shamwari, upinde."

languageSwitcher.tip: Shandisa mapasiwedhi emitauro akasiyana paDoor yaDurin kuwana makamuri akakosha!
